query: Banger Mail complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: Complaints mount as rural mail delivery in Maine gets more erratic
results.content:
“If you have a check or you have something that you’re expecting or a bill that’s going to be paid, I mean, it’s kind of frustrating not to get your mail,” Jones said.

Sian Evans, of Belfast, shares her frustration. Each month she writes and mails several checks to make payments for herself and her elderly mother. She never had a problem until last year, when her checks stopped arriving at their destinations. Occasionally, one would arrive six or eight weeks late. But most simply vanished.

Over seven months Evans racked up $500 in late fees and finally decided to set up online payments instead.

“I had to go, ‘OK, fine, I’ll do digital transfers, I’ll do it that way,’” Evans said. “But what’s the point of having a post office?” [...] Bangor Daily News

Bangor Daily News

# Complaints mount as rural mail delivery in Maine gets more erratic

Avatar photo  by Bridget Huber  Updated

### Share this:

 Share on X (Opens in new window) X

 Email a link to a friend (Opens in new window) Email

 

A customer walks out of the Lincolnvile Center Post Office in Lincolnville on Monday. Credit: Bridget Huber / BDN [...] Virginia Jones loves her mail carrier. He delivers the mail faithfully to her Palermo home. He works hard, and even delivers mail on some Sunday nights, she says.

“He goes above and beyond,” she said.

But Jones is one of several midcoast residents who, despite the dedication of their local mail carriers, say that basic delivery is breaking down as the U.S. Postal Service struggles with staffing issues and changes intended to address its financial woes.

results.title: How to Write a Banger Sales Email: Lessons from a Recent Email | Kyle Lacy posted on the topic | LinkedIn
results.content:
The best messaging advice I ever got was from a sales exec named Ross. For context, I was early in my career, working at a startup as a sales engineer. It was my job to demo the product to prospects and answer their technical questions. When i’d get a question, I’d answer it… ...but as any engineer does… …I’d linger on, explaining why and how it worked that way. I was always really proud of my answers because I really knew my stuff! But after my 3rd demo, Ross pulled me aside. And I’ll never forget what he said: Ross: “When someone asks you a question, give them a direct answer and then SHUT THE HELL UP!” This feedback crushed me. But he was 100% right. I thought I was educating and inspiring the prospects. But I was actually frustrating and confusing them. This situation is exactly the [...] I took over 100 sales calls in 3 months. 90% of them shouldn't have happened. Everyone glorifies founder-led sales. I loved the discovery part, learning what customers actually needed. But most calls were people asking basic questions. "Can it do X?" "How does pricing work?" "Can I see it?" We had a free plan. Self-serve product. Answers on the site. But they booked a call anyway. Here's where it broke: I'd see a signup from someone perfect for the right role, right company, right use case. I'd check their LinkedIn, draft a personalized email, and queue the right demo. 48 hours later? Half had moved on! Meanwhile, I'm on my 80th "show me how it works" call while high-intent leads slip away. That's why we built Path, our AI demo agent for buyers, not salespeople. When buyers can ask [...] 2mo 

 Report this comment

I wonder how much of this email's success comes from them having already broken into your BDR team as Will mentioned. They started elsewhere and worked up the org and are multithreadong with you. They may have been less successful if they started with the C-suite route. Lesson to be learned here. Really well done on their part.

Like Reply  6 Reactions   7 Reactions

Founder at Outbound Advisors

 Report this comment

Surprised that you saw a chunk of text that big and decided to read itl lol. But the fact that 99% of sales sucks makes that 1% stand out. Same is true on LI but with 0 sales copy and only personally relevant info

results.title: Privacy policy – Banger Overland & Outdoors
results.content:
## Complaints

If you have complaints about how we process your personal information, please contact us using the contact details provided below. If you are not satisfied with our response to your complaint, depending on where you live you may have the right to appeal our decision by contacting us using the contact details set out below, or lodge your complaint with your local data protection authority.

## International Users

Please note that we may transfer, store and process your personal information outside the country you live in. Your personal information is also processed by staff and third party service providers and partners in these countries. [...] Withdrawal of Consent: Where we rely on consent to process your personal information, you may have the right to withdraw this consent.
 Appeal: You may have a right to appeal our decision if we decline to process your request. You can do so by replying directly to our denial.
 Managing Communication Preferences: We may send you promotional emails, and you may opt out of receiving these at any time by using the unsubscribe option displayed in our emails to you. If you opt out, we may still send you non-promotional emails, such as those about your account or orders that you have made.

results.title: Banger Mail: work email for teams and AI agents
results.content:
Google Workspace

Client note

Gmail

TEAM INBOXES

## Shared addresses for real teamwork

Turn support@, sales@, and marketing@ into shared mailboxes your team can run from one place. Teammates and AI agents can triage, draft, and keep high-volume email moving without dropping the queue on one person.

AGENTS WITH REVIEW

## AI agents do the work. You review it.

Agents triage, draft replies, and apply labels alongside your team, and every agent action goes through review before it ships, like a pull request on GitHub. You stay in control; the busywork doesn't.

Tiago Loureiro and Luiz Gualberto, founders of Banger Mail, standing in an office.

> “We're rebuilding work email the way it should be: fast, native, and with AI you can actually trust.”
